dualstreamgg এর প্রোফাইল ছবি

dualstreamgg

Beautifully powerful streaming. Astonishingly easy.   
  
DualStream brings Desktop and Mobile audiences your content at the same time, from a single patent-pending engine. DualStream Relay carries your broadcast to every platform from our servers — and if your connection blinks, disconnection protection keeps your stream alive. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips, cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in.

results.title: multitwitch
results.content:
# MultiTwitch.tv

Welcome to MultiTwitch! You can use this site to watch any number of twitch.tv streams at the same time (as long as your computer can handle it). Simply put the streams you want in the url. For example: multitwitch.tv/gunnermaniac3/narcissawright. MultiTwitch will optimize the layout of streams to give you the maximum size on each of the streams, while maintaining aspect ratio. For the curious, the source of this page is available at github.com/bhamrick/multitwitch. Happy streamwatching!

Created by Brian Hamrick

Add Stream

Change Streams | Toggle Chat

results.title: How To Multistream To EVERY Platform For FREE In 2024
results.content:
The pro of this is that you’re just encoding and streaming one stream, and letting the service handle the rest, this means no added stress on your PC or internet, another great pro is Restream will combine your platform chats for you, and even give you a browser source to put it on screen for viewers, granted it looks like ass but hey, better than nothing, now the cons though are for starters services like Restream tend to lock really important features behind paywalls, they tend to be horribly unstable constantly crashing one or multiple platforms, at least in my experience, but worst of all, they lock your streams quality to the lowest platform.

We get around this instead by doing the second type of Multistreaming, Direct. [...] on Tik Tok or shorts but for me I don't use any of that because because I think it just adds complications that don't make my streams content better I like my stream setup to be really simple and minimal so I can focus on just making something entertaining plus when it comes to multi streaming Tik Tok and vertical want very different content to horizontal platforms if I streamed on Tik Tok as if I was a twitch streamer I'd not get a single viewer so I wouldn't even bother multi streaming to those platforms I'd just go live to them and give them the energy they deserve that said if you do want to learn about any of that I'll link a made of mine named nutty who has an amazing in-depth video on it down below and if you want to learn how multistreaming can actually pretty much destroy your [...] to restream and restream will stream to the toggled on and connected accounts you'll see in this list you can even click this button right here to see all of your chats merge together now one thing I noticed was that if I tried to go live before the YouTube stream scheduled time even by a minute or two restream would absolutely panic and glitch out and not be able to go to it so make sure you're going live at the right time and again make sure you're capping your stream settings inside OBS to twitch's recommendations as it's the lowest quality platform so with that out of the way let's talk about direct multistreaming as I said today we're doing that with a plugin called ATM which adds this amazing dock to your OBS and just kind of makes multi streaming insanely easy no joke when I
